title: Enhancing essential oil extraction from orange peels using ultrasound-assisted hydro-distillation: A sustainable approach
author: Bodea, Ioana M.
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This study investigates the application of ultrasound-assisted hydro-distillation to improve the extraction of essential oils from orange peels, a major citrus processing by-product. The work evaluates the efficiency of the extraction process and its potential contribution to the sustainable valorization of agro-industrial residues. The results provide insights into greener extraction technologies that can enhance resource recovery and support circular economy strategies in the food and agricultural sectors.
